name: Alaska Sourdough Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the starter in a large bowl.
2. Add 2 cups flour and 2 cups milk. Mix well and cover.
3. Leave in a warm place overnight.
4. The next morning, take out 1 cup of starter at room temperature.
5. To the remaining sponge, add 2 eggs, 1 teaspoon soda, 3 tablespoons sugar, 1 teaspoon salt, and 2 teaspoons baking powder.
6. Mix well.
7. Cook on a hot griddle. For a smaller mixture, use 2 cups of the remaining starter and half the ingredients.
